name: Organizacion Soriana, S. A. B. de C. V.
summary: Organizaci√É¬≥n Soriana, S. A. B. de C. V., together with its subsidiaries, operates various formats of supermarket stores in Mexico. The company's supermarket stores offer various food, clothing, general merchandise, health products, and basic household services, as well as grocery products and perishable goods under the retail, medium wholesale, and wholesale schemes. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 810 stores, which included 380 Hyper, 165 Markets, 127 Super, 103 Express, and 35 City Club. The company also operates 107 convenience stores under the Super City name by own stores and franchises; and Soriana.com, an online store. In addition, it leases commercial premises to each store as part of the commercial area; and conducts commercial developments. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Monterrey, Mexico.
